displayTitle: 2025-12-03 - Māori Affairs Committee - Briefing on Te Mātāwai
description: Wednesday 3 December 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee Briefing on Te Mātāwai Te Mātāwai Poari Brenda Soutar, Hoa Toihau Mātai Smith, Hoa Toihau Kiwa Hammond, Mema Poari Ruakiri Fairhall Te Mātāwai Kaimahi Toko Kapea, Chief Executive (Acting) Karl Smith, Corporate Services Manager Basil Keane, Chief Advisor (Acting) Michelle Rikihana-Vieira, Communications Manager Nate Brabender, Investments Manager Wiremu Buurman, Principal Advisor Ursula Featherston, Senior Strategic Advisor Nga Peita Hamilton-Katene, Board Secretary
descriptionSummary: Briefing on Te Mātāwai. Te Mātāwai Poari. Brenda Soutar, Hoa Toihau
